name: King's Valley
author: Kanare Kato (Logy Games) / AGP port
description: King's Valley (Kanare Kato) on a 5x5 board. Each side has 1 King + 4 Soldiers; every piece slides the MAXIMUM distance in a straight line (no stopping short). Race your King onto the central 'King's Valley' square to win. Only the King may stop on the centre; a trapped King loses.
